name: mtg-gameplay-research-matrix-v1
description: Pre-registered comparison of cheap imitation baselines, structured belief-aware policies, a representation/world-model experiment, and deck-local search. Model sizes and data thresholds are hypotheses to be tested by scaling curves, not claims embedded in this manifest.

split.notes: All decisions, states, and transitions from a game remain in one partition. Additional benchmark reports should include time-block, matchup, archetype, and card-set holdouts.

hiddenInformation.notes: The policy receives public observations, own private information, and optional beliefs generated only from information available at decision time. Ground-truth hidden zones may supervise a belief model during engine self-play but are never policy inputs.

features.notes: Instance IDs remain provenance fields only. Action inputs use canonical cast/activate/target/mode/payment semantics.

experiments.name: hashed-option-ranker
experiments.input: canonical hashed state and legal-option text
experiments.role: minimum viable learned baseline and feature-pipeline check

experiments.name: structured-set-behavior-cloning
experiments.input: per-object structured rows plus composite card semantics
experiments.role: tests whether structured permutation-symmetric state encoding beats hashing before world-model pretraining

experiments.name: recurrent-belief-behavior-cloning
experiments.input: public event history, own private zones, and calibrated opponent-card beliefs
experiments.role: separates imperfect-information memory from latent-dynamics claims

experiments.name: structured-action-conditioned-jepa

expertCost.notes: The expert score is a diagnostic/auxiliary target. Terminal win/loss remains the game objective.

experiments.role: representation and transition-model experiment; not assumed superior until it transfers to held-out decisions or search

experiments.name: xmage-search-distillation
experiments.input: cloned-game public-information search targets over canonical legal actions

expertCost.notes: Used only to inspect or rerank tied shallow lines; search value and terminal outcome are reported separately.

experiments.role: tests whether engine-grounded counterfactual targets improve policy quality more directly than self-supervised pretraining

experiments.name: deck-local-puct-selfplay
experiments.input: deck-local policy/value network with XMage PUCT search
experiments.role: MageZero-style local-optimization comparison under the same fixed deck, seed, seat, and evaluation protocol
